Note: Select the Accessories_Data.xlsx Excel file from the accessories_quotebuilder OneDrive folder to load products, customers, and trader names. Any edits saved in the Accessories_Data.xlsx workbook will be reflected the next time it is loaded into the quote builder.

Each freight pool is split only across lines assigned to that Freight #, by each line’s share of that pool’s priced subtotal (line price ÷ matching subtotal), then folded into that line’s unit price and total. On the printed quote, every price already includes freight — there is no separate freight line.
